## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Shaina Louis-Jean for the Engagement Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proactive Upsell:** Secured a $5k/mo ARR expansion by proactively auditing a client's site for Meta's standards during a 6-month acquisition, creating a case study-worthy win.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Systems-Driven:** Automated a personal tennis-coaching business to scale from one to three locations, demonstrating a core skill in building efficient, repeatable processes.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Actionable Feedback:** Improved client reporting by shifting from storytelling minutiae to high-level solutions, increasing clarity and retention.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [**Relationship-Focused:** Builds partnerships to gain early insight into client changes (e.g., budget shifts, new hires), enabling proactive defense of the agency relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

## Topics

### Professional Background & Philosophy

  - [**Current Role:** Automating a personal tennis-coaching business to focus on systems and efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Automation:** Built a customer feedback program and a referral program (30% off incentive) to drive growth.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Scaling:** Expanded the business from one to three locations (Kendall, Wynwood, Broward County) using geotargeting.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [**Agency Experience (829 & Beacon Digital):** Managed 10–12 mid-size to enterprise clients, each with a dedicated service "pod."](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [**Pod Structure:** Account Manager leads a team of specialists (Paid Media, SEO, Content, Creative).](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Internal team calls (2 days pre-client call) → Client agenda sent (24 hrs pre-call) for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)

### Case Study: Proactive Upsell During Meta Acquisition

  - [**Context:** A mid-size client was acquired by Meta, creating a 6-month window of uncertainty where the agency's performance would determine contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Proactively audited the client's site to meet Meta's enterprise standards.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [**UX Analysis:** Used Hotjar for a website breakdown → informed a partial site refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**SEO Audit:** Reviewed on-page, off-page, and technical SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:** Built topic clusters to capture expensive paid keywords organically, providing 10 samples and 3 full articles.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Secured a $5k/mo ARR expansion and a renewal with Meta, a win leadership used for a company case study.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [**Learning:** Trusting gut feelings on team workload is critical. Shaina's delayed intervention to assist an overutilized SEO operator caused preventable internal revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)

### Client Management & Communication

  - [**Constructive Feedback:** Reports were too detailed, focusing on minutiae instead of high-level solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [**Action:** Now uses bullet points and prioritizes high-level solutions, reserving details for client-requested deep dives.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [**Impact:** Reduces client confusion and improves information retention.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**Positive Feedback:** Praised for a pleasant personality.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
      - [**Past Misstep:** A smile used to convey confidence was misread as not taking bad news seriously.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
      - [**Action:** Learned to adjust demeanor for different situations, a skill that coincided with a promotion to Senior Account Manager.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

### Tool Proficiency

  - [**PM & Analytics:** ClickUp, Google Search Console, Looker Studio, Screaming Frog, SEMrush, Google Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Marketing & Sales:** HubSpot, Salesforce, Lift Relation.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**AI & Scheduling:** ChatGPT, Motion (scheduling).](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Other:** Adobe, Asana, LinkedIn, Facebook.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget McGillivray:** Follow up with Shaina Louis-Jean regarding next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [**Shaina Louis-Jean:** Email Bridget McGillivray with questions.](https://fathom.video/share/1xZ-J19xxgPRsSUAmxEHf9Uims1Uik9G?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
